description.ko: 오디오 주파수와 디지털 기하학의 접점을 탐구하는 몰입형 시각 여정으로, 음파가 유형의 3D 풍경으로 나타나는 모습을 보여줍니다.
description.en: An immersive visual journey exploring the intersection of auditory frequencies and digital geometry, where sound waves manifest as tangible 3D landscapes.

prompt: Abstract cinematic 3D sound visualization, ECHO-0 aesthetic, kinetic typography and fluid wave patterns, neon cyan and obsidian black color palette, oscillating frequencies transformed into crystalline structures, hyper-realistic textures, 8k resolution, ray tracing, atmospheric lighting.
